description_long: This is a rectangular, dark-colored bottle with a tall, square neck and a decorative cap. The front face features a large white label bordered in green and red, with a circular emblem and stylized text, reminiscent of a Jägermeister bottle. The cap is green with orange and yellow striping and pixelated patterns, matching the bottle's retro, pixel-art style. The back and sides of the bottle are plain, with only a faint border outlining the label area. The bottle appears to be made of glass and is designed to hold liquid, with a sturdy, blocky form and a prominent, easily gripped cap.
description: A dark, rectangular glass bottle with a pixel-art label and a colorful, square cap, resembling a stylized liquor bottle.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large white label with green and red borders and a circular emblem, with the cap's pixelated design visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain dark surface with a faint border, and the cap's green and orange pattern.
description_view_2: Opposite front view with a detailed label featuring the text 'Jäümina' and additional red and green elements.
description_view_3: Side view identical to view 1, showing a plain dark surface and the cap's design.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label with green and red borders, circular emblem, and the text 'Jäümina' in red; pixel-art style throughout.
